assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: digest-match.md, Section 'Result' (lines 107-114): 'The digests match, so execution proceeds **silently** -- no user prompt, no additional latency, no warning message. The workflow continues directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) without any interruption.
